questions.question: Design a 16-bit CRC-CCITT error detecting program to identify single-bit errors in digital data. Explain the process of generating the CRC-CCITT polynomial.
questions.hint: Explain the process of generating the CRC-CCITT polynomial and provide a basic flowchart of the CRC-CCITT algorithm.

questions.question: Write a C program to implement the 16-bit CRC-CCITT error detecting algorithm. The program should take an 8-bit byte as input and generate the CRC-CCITT value.
questions.hint: Use the CRC-CCITT polynomial (0x1021) and provide comments to explain each step of the algorithm.

questions.question: Compare the CRC-CCITT 16-bit error detecting algorithm with the Hamming 16-bit error detecting algorithm. Explain the differences between the two algorithms and discuss when to use each.
questions.hint: Explain the main differences between the two algorithms and provide examples of scenarios where one might be preferred over the other.
